penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out by the maximum time limit. The cutting appears to have stopped partway around the circle.

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on task completion. Claude reported incomplete circle at 300s timeout, while GPT reported completion at 115.2s with line deviation. Given the fundamental disagreement on whether the task was completed, and Claude's specific observation of cutting stopping partway, the incomplete task assessment is more defensible under the rubric's automatic-zero condition for non-completion.
